name: Apple Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread apples evenly in the bottom of the pie shell.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together sugar and butter. Blend in lemon juice and 3 beaten egg yolks. Pour over apples.
3. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg. Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 to 45 minutes.
4. Beat egg whites until peaks form. Gradually add powdered sugar and vanilla, beating until meringue is stiff.
5. Spread over the top of the pie. Return to oven. Reduce heat to 325 degrees F. Bake 5 to 10 minutes longer, until meringue is lightly browned.
